I posted this a while back, but with the return of the **Origin of TIme**, a character *reset* item that came with all the recent changes, I wanted to share this again. A 60 second breakdown of the Origin of Time.

embeds.title: Morimens: Awakener Reset Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovec...
embeds.description:
A 60 second overview of select features in the game Morimens. The second anniversary update changed a lot, so today let's talk about the Awakener Reset and the item it comes from; the Origin of Time! 

Anime + Lovecraftian cosmos makes for a memorable gameplay experience. The characters are beautifu

1. Kathi - Arachne Midrange Aggro
2. Wanda Tawil - Arachne Control
3. Liz Xu - Arachne Poison

Video is time stamped so you can go to the section you want to see.
